query:
SELECT decision, COUNT(*) as cnt, 
  AVG(CAST(ocrConfidence AS DECIMAL(5,2))) as avg_confidence,
  SUM(CASE WHEN hasOrderNumber = 'yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_order,
  SUM(CASE WHEN fraudFlagCount = 0 OR fraudFlagCount IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_fraud
FROM receipt_review_logs 
GROUP BY decision;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT decision, COUNT(*) as cnt, 
  AVG(CAST(ocrConfidence AS DECIMAL(5,2))) as avg_confidence,
  SUM(CASE WHEN hasOrderNumber = 'yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_order,
  SUM(CASE WHEN fraudFlagCount = 0 OR fraudFlagCount IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_fraud
FROM receipt_review_logs 
GROUP BY decision;
